name: Raspberry Bisque
recipeInstructions:
1. Sweeten the raspberries with sugar.
2. Stir in lemon juice.
3. Beat everything together using a mixer to break up the berries.
4. Keep the mixture icy cold.
5. Melt butter in a saucepan, blend in flour and salt.
6. Add cream and milk all at once and stir vigorously over moderate heat.
7. Continue cooking until thickened, stirring constantly.
8. Cool occasionally by stirring.
9. Chill.
10. Just before serving, add raspberries gradually to the sauce, stirring vigorously.
Makes 6 to 8 servings.
